Coslad 84APVUD

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 72
Func Name: Lampes à décharge à droite 84

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "T93",
    "soft": "0022",
    "version": "0007"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "T93",
    "soft": "0022",
    "version": "0011"
  }
]

    "dtctype": 3,
    "devicedata": {

    },
    "name": "Actionneur"
  },

  {
    "dtc": 39940,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Lampe Xénon"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 39938,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "Vitesse du véhicule": "0"
    },
    "name": "Signal Vitesse"
  }
]

    "sentbytes": "2180",
    "name": "Read system identification",
    "deny_sds": [],

        "firstbyte": 9,

        "firstbyte": 17,

    "minbytes": 23,
    "sentbytes": "21C0",
    "name": "Read system variables",
    "deny_sds": [],

        "firstbyte": 7,

      },

        "firstbyte": 22,

      },

      },

      },

        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 18,
        "ref": true
      },
